recommendation: Add sequential task chaining (depends_on) to MCP to prevent concurrent devctl setup conflicts
implementationSummary: Added /mcp/exec dependsOn support with wait/fail dependency handling in mcp_server.py and added devctl stateful-command lock serialization using flock in dev/bin/devctl.

recommendation: Normalize MCP terminal status handling to include success as terminal in polling examples/docs
implementationSummary: Added normalizedStatus and terminal fields to /mcp/status plus runtime.statusModel metadata with preferredPollingTerminalStatuses=[success,failed].
